offer: For property managers processing 5–15 invoices/month, inaccurate utility bill payments cause cash flow gaps. We track and reconcile utility bill payments instead of manual tracking of utility bills and contracts.
problem: Inaccurate utility bill payments leading to financial discrepancies.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for property managers
Indie Hackers discussions on similar issues
DM outreach to property managers with demo video
Community groups sharing property management tools
try_it: Let users try monthly discrepancy notifications and manual entry on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
